trigger_events.description: Time-bound events that create a window of relevance.

structural_signals.description: Slower-moving, ongoing state rather than a single event.

content_signals.description: Things the contact or company said/published publicly.

engagement_signals.description: First-party signals the user's own company has, not public research.
engagement_signals.source: user-provided only; not something this skill searches for

relevance_scoring_guidance: Rank signals by (a) specificity to this exact company/contact, (b) recency, and (c) direct tie-in to the offer's value proposition. A recent, specific, offer-relevant signal outranks an older or generic one.
